owner_directive: Live hotfix batch (owner-guided): fix bug#1 (desktop New workflow/note/custom-block no-op: window.prompt unsupported in Electron) + 13 UX changes: ux2 fold Package into New dropdown; ux3 tidy component spacing; ux4 project-name max-width halved; ux5 global select chevron inset; ux6 node status badge top-right→bottom-right; ux7 bottom tab reorder; ux8 Logs git-list restyle; ux9 minimap node color = block body color; ux10 delete TypeLegend; ux11 tab emoji→lucide; ux12 remove group feature; ux13 resizable annotation + edit affordance; ux14 palette default collapsed; ux15 project tree font size. All frontend, non-protected.
